scripts.skill:risk: npm run build && node skill/scripts/run-skill.mjs risk-scan
scripts.skill:dri: npm run build && node skill/scripts/run-skill.mjs dri-suggest
scripts.skill:brief: npm run build && node skill/scripts/run-skill.mjs brief-weekly
scripts.skill:health: npm run build && node skill/scripts/run-skill.mjs org-health
scripts.export:doc: npm run build && mkdir -p outputs && node skill/scripts/export-doc.mjs brief-weekly
scripts.export:feishu-doc: npm run build && mkdir -p outputs && node skill/scripts/export-feishu-doc.mjs brief-weekly
